text: Ṣād. By the Qur’ān containing reminder...
tl: Saaad; wal-Qur-aani ziz zikr

text: But those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension.
tl: Balil lazeena kafaroo fee 'izzatinw Wa-shiqaaq

text: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.
tl: Kam ahlaknaa min qablihim min qarnin fanaadaw Wa-laata heena manaas

text: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, \"This is a magician and a liar.
tl: Wa-'ajibooo an jaaa'a-hum munzirum minhum Wa-qaalal kaafiroona haazaa saahirun kazzaab

text: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing.\"
tl: Aja'alal aalihata Ilaahanw Waahidan inna haazaa lashai'un 'ujaab

text: And the eminent among them went forth, [saying], \"Continue, and be patient over [the defense of] your gods. Indeed, this is a thing intended.
tl: Wantalaqal mala-u minhum anim shoo wasbiroo 'alaaa aalihatikum innna haazaa lashai-'uien yuraad

text: We have not heard of this in the latest religion. This is not but a fabrication.
tl: Maa sami'naa bihaazaa fil millatil aakhirati in haazaaa illakh tilaaq

text: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?\" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.
tl: A-unzila 'alaihiz zikru min baininaa; bal hum fee shakkin min Zikree bal lammaa yazooqoo 'azaab

text: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower?
tl: Am'indahum khazaaa 'inu rahmati Rabbikal 'Azeezil Wahhab

text: Or is theirs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them? Then let them ascend through [any] ways of access.
tl: Am lahum mulkus samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-maa bainahumaa falyartaqoo fil asbaab

text: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers].
tl: Jundum maa hunaalika mahzoomum minal Ahzaab

text: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] ʿAad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes,
tl: Kazzabat qablahum qawmu Noohinw Wa-'Aadunw Wa-Fir'awnu zul awtaad

text: And [the tribe of] Thamūd and the people of Lot and the companions of the thicket [i.e., people of Madyan]. Those are the companies.
tl: Wa-Samoodu Wa-qawmu Lootinw Wa-As-haabul 'Aykah; ulaaa'ikal Ahzaab

text: Each of them denied the messengers, so My penalty was justified.
tl: In kullun illaa kazzabar Rusula fahaqqa 'iqaab

text: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay.
tl: Wa-maa yanzuru haaa-ulaaa'i illaa saihatanw waahidatam maa lahaa min fawaaq

text: And they say, \"Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account.\"
tl: Wa-qaaloo Rabbanaa 'ajjil lanaa qittanaa qabla Yawmil Hisaab

text: Be patient over what they say and remember Our servant, David, the possessor of strength; indeed, he was one who repeatedly turned back [to Allāh].
tl: Isbir 'alaa maa yaqooloona wazkur 'abdanaa Daawooda zal aidi innahooo awwaab

text: Indeed, We subjected the mountains [to praise] with him, exalting [Allāh] in the [late] afternoon and [after] sunrise.
tl: Innaa sakhkharnal jibaala ma'ahoo yusabbihna bil'ashiyyi wal-ishraaq

text: And the birds were assembled, all with him repeating [praises].
tl: Wattayra mahshoorah; kullul lahooo awwaab

text: And We strengthened his kingdom and gave him wisdom and discernment in speech.
tl: Wa-shadadnaa mulkahoo Wa-aatainaahul Hikmata Wa-faslal khitaab

text: And has there come to you the news of the adversaries, when they climbed over the wall of [his] prayer chamber -
tl: Wa-hal ataaka naba'ul khasm; iz tasawwarul mihraab

text: When they entered upon David and he was alarmed by them? They said, \"Fear not. [We are] two adversaries, one of whom has wronged the other, so judge between us with truth and do not exceed [it] and guide us to the sound path.
tl: Iz dakhaloo 'alaa Daawooda fafazi'a minhum qaaloo laa takhaf khasmaani baghaa ba'dunaa 'alaa ba'din fahkum bainanaaa bilhaqqi Wa-laa tushtit wahdinaaa ilaa Sawaaa'is Siraat

text: Indeed this, my brother, has ninety-nine ewes, and I have one ewe; so he said, 'Entrust her to me,' and he overpowered me in speech.\"
tl: Inna haazaaa akhee lahoo tis'unw Wa-tis'oona na'jatanw Wa-liya na'jatunw waahidah; faqaala akfilneeha Wa-'azzanee fil khitaab

text: [David] said, \"He has certainly wronged you in demanding your ewe [in addition] to his ewes. And indeed, many associates oppress one another, except for those who believe and do righteous deeds - and few are they.\" And David became certain that We had tried him, and he asked forgiveness of his Lord and fell down bowing [in prostration] and turned in repentance [to Allāh].
tl: Qaala laqad zalamaka bisu-'aali na'jatika ilaa ni'aajih; Wa-inna kaseeran minal khulataaa'i la-yabghee ba'duhum 'alaa ba'din illal lazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati Wa-qaleelun maa hum; Wa-zanna Daawoodu annamaa fatannaahu fastaghfara Rabbahoo Wa-kharra raaki'anw Wa-anaab

text: So We forgave him that; and indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return.
tl: Faghafarnaa lahoo zaalik; Wa-inna lahoo 'indanaa lazulfaa Wa-husna ma-aab

text: [We said], \"O David, indeed We have made you a successor upon the earth, so judge between the people in truth and do not follow [your own] desire, as it will lead you astray from the way of Allāh.\" Indeed, those who go astray from the way of Allāh will have a severe punishment for having forgotten the Day of Account.
tl: Yaa-Daawoodu innaa ja'alnaaka khaleefatan fil ardi fahkum bainan naasi bilhaqqi Wa-laa tattabi'il hawaa fayudillaka 'an sabeelil laah; innal lazeena yadilloona 'an sabeelil laah; lahum 'azaabun shadeedum bimaa nasoo Yawmal Hisaab

text: And We did not create the heaven and the earth and that between them aimlessly. That is the assumption of those who disbelieve, so woe to those who disbelieve from the Fire.
tl: Wa-maa khalaqnas samaaa'a wal-arda Wa-maa bainahumaa baatilaa; zaalika zannul lazeena kafaroo; fa-waylul lil-lazeena kafaroo minan Naar

text: Or should We treat those who believe and do righteous deeds like corrupters in the land? Or should We treat those who fear Allāh like the wicked?
tl: Am naj'alul lazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati kalmufisdeena fil ardi am naj'alul muttaqeena kalfujjaar

text: [This is] a blessed Book which We have revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], that they might reflect upon its verses and that those of understanding would be reminded.
tl: Kitaabun anzalnaahu ilaika mubaarakul liyaddabbarooo Aayaatihee Wa-liyatazakkara ulul albaab

text: And to David We gave Solomon. An excellent servant, indeed he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].
tl: Wa-wahabnaa li-Daawooda Sulaimaan; ni'mal 'abd; innahoo awwaab

text: [Mention] when there were exhibited before him in the afternoon the poised [standing] racehorses.
tl: Iz 'urida 'alaihi bil'ashiy-yis saafinaatul jiyaad

text: And he said, \"Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until it [i.e., the sun] disappeared into the curtain [of darkness].\"
tl: Faqaala inneee ahbabtu hubbal khairi 'an zikri Rabbee hattaa tawaarat bilhijaab

text: [He said], \"Return them to me,\" and set about striking [their] legs and necks.
tl: Ruddoohaa 'alaiya fa-tafiqa mas-ham bissooqi wal-a'naaq

text: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned.
tl: Wa-laqad fatannaa Sulaimaana Wa-alqainaa 'alaa kursiyyihee jasadan summa anaab

text: He said, \"My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower.\"
tl: Qaala Rabbigh fir lee Wa-hab lee mulkal laa yambaghee li-ahadin min ba'dee innaka Antal Wahhaab

text: So We subjected to him the wind blowing by his command, gently, wherever he directed,
tl: Fa-sakharnaa lahur reeha tajree bi-amrihee rukhaaa'an haisu asaab

text: And [also] the devils [of jinn] - every builder and diver
tl: Wash-Shayaateena kulla bannaaa'inw Wa-ghawwaas

text: And others bound together in irons.
tl: Wa-aakhareena muqarraneena fil asfaad

text: [We said], \"This is Our gift, so grant or withhold without account.\"
tl: Haazaa 'ataaa'unaa famnun aw amsik bighairi hisaab

text: And indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return.
tl: Wa-inna lahoo 'indanaa lazulfaa Wa-husna ma-aab

text: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, \"Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment.\"
tl: Wazkur 'abdanaaa Ayyoob; iz naada Rabbahooo annee massaniyash Shaitaanu bi-nusbinw Wa-'azaab

text: [So he was told], \"Strike [the ground] with your foot; this is a [spring for a] cool bath and drink.\"
tl: Urkud bi-rijlika haaza mughtasalun baaridunw Wa-sharaab

text: And We granted him his family and a like [number] with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for those of understanding.
tl: Wa-wahabnaa lahoo ahlahoo Wa-mislahum ma'ahum rahmatan minna Wa-zikraa li-ulil albaab

text: [We said], \"And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath.\" Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].
tl: Wa-khuz biyadika dighsan fadrib bihee Wa-laa tahnas, innaa wajadnaahu saabiraa; ni'mal 'abd; innahooo awwaab

text: And remember Our servants, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob - those of strength and [religious] vision.
tl: Wazkur 'ibaadanaaa Ibraaheema Wa-Is-haaqa Wa-Ya'qooba ulil aydee walabsaar

text: Indeed, We chose them for an exclusive quality: remembrance of the home [of the Hereafter].
tl: Innaaa akhlasnaahum bi-khaalisatin zikrad daar

text: And indeed they are, to Us, among the chosen and outstanding.
tl: Wa-innahum 'indanaa laminal mustafainal akhyaar

text: And remember Ishmael, Elisha and Dhul-Kifl, and all are among the outstanding.
tl: Wazkur Ismaa'eela wal Yasa'a Wa-Zal-Kifli Wa-kullun minal akhyaar

text: This is a reminder. And indeed, for the righteous is a good place of return -
tl: Haazaa zikrun Wa-inna lil-muttaqeena la-husna ma-aab

text: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them.
tl: Jannaati 'adnin mufattahatan lahumul abwaab

text: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink.
tl: Muttaki'eena feehaa yad'oona feehaa bifaakihatin kaseeratinw Wa-sharaab

text: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances and of equal age.
tl: Wa-'indahum qaasiraatut tarfi atraab

text: This is what you, [the righteous], are promised for the Day of Account.
tl: Haazaa maa too'adoona li-Yawmil Hisaab

text: Indeed, this is Our provision; for it there is no depletion.
tl: Inna haazaa larizqunaa maa lahoo min nafaad

text: This [is so]. But indeed, for the transgressors is an evil place of return -
tl: Haazaa; Wa-inna littaagheena lasharra ma-aab

text: Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the resting place.
tl: Jahannama yaslawnahaa fa-bi'sal mihaad

text: This - so let them taste it - is scalding water and [foul] purulence.
tl: Haazaa falyazooqoohu hameemunw Wa-ghassaaq

text: And other [punishments] of its type [in various] kinds.
tl: Wa-aakharu min shakliheee azwaaj

text: [Its inhabitants will say], \"This is a company bursting in with you. No welcome for them. Indeed, they will burn in the Fire.\"
tl: Haazaa fawjun muqtahimun ma'akum laa marhaban bihim; innahum saalun Naar

text: They will say, \"Nor you! No welcome for you. You, [our leaders], brought this upon us, and wretched is the settlement.\"
tl: Qaaloo bal antum laa marhaban bikum; antum qaddamtumoohu lanaa fabi'sal qaraar

text: They will say, \"Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us - increase for him double punishment in the Fire.\"
tl: Qaaloo Rabbanaa man qaddama lanaa haazaa fa-zidhu 'azaaban di'fan fin Naar

text: And they will say, \"Why do we not see men whom we used to count among the worst?
tl: Wa-qaaloo maa lanaa laa naraa rijaalan kunnaa na'udduhum minal ashraar

text: Is it [because] we took them in ridicule, or has [our] vision turned away from them?\"
tl: Attakhaznaahum sikh-riyyan am zaaghat 'anhumul absaar

text: Indeed, that is truth [i.e., reality] - the quarreling of the people of the Fire.
tl: Inna zaalika lahaqqun takhaasumu Ahlin Naar

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"I am only a warner, and there is not any deity except Allāh, the One, the Prevailing,
tl: Qul innamaaa ana munzirunw Wa-maa min laahin illal laahul Waahidul Qahhaar

text: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver.\"
tl: Rabbus samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-maa bainahumal 'Azeezul Ghaffaar

text: Say, \"It is great news
tl: Qul huwa naba'un 'azeem

text: From which you turn away.
tl: Antum 'anhu mu'ridoon

text: I had no knowledge of the exalted assembly [of angels] when they were disputing [the creation of Adam].
tl: Maa kaana liya min 'ilmin bil-mala'il a'laaa iz yakhtasimoon

text: It has not been revealed to me except that I am a clear warner.\"
tl: Ien-yoohaaa ilaiya illaaa anna maaa ana nazeerun mubeen

text: [So mention] when your Lord said to the angels, \"Indeed, I am going to create a human being from clay.
tl: Iz qaala Rabbuka lilmalaaa'ikati innee khaaliqun basharan min teen

text: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration.\"
tl: Fa-iza sawwaituhoo Wa-nafakhtu feehi mir roohee faqa'oo lahoo saajideen

text: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,
tl: Fasajadal malaaa'ikatu kulluhum ajma'oon

text: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers.
tl: Illaaa Iblees; stakbara Wa-kaana minal kaafireen

text: [Allāh] said, \"O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?\"
tl: Qaala yaaa-Ibleesu maa mana'aka an tasjuda limaa khalaqtu bi-yadaiyya-'a stakbarta am kunta min al-'aaleen

text: He said, \"I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay.\"
tl: Qaala ana khairum minhu; khalaqtanee min naarinw Wa-khalaqtahoo min teen

text: [Allāh] said, \"Then get out of it [i.e., Paradise], for indeed, you are expelled.
tl: Qaala fakhruj minhaa fa-innaka rajeem

text: And indeed, upon you is My curse until the Day of Recompense.\"
tl: Wa-inna 'alaika la'nateee ilaa Yawmid Deen

text: He said, \"My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected.\"
tl: Qaala Rabbi fa-anzirneee ilaa Yawmi yub'asoon

text: [Allāh] said, \"So indeed, you are of those reprieved
tl: Qaala fa-innaka minal munzareen

text: Until the Day of the time well-known.\"
tl: Ilaa Yawmil waqtil ma'loom

text: [Iblees] said, \"By Your might, I will surely mislead them all
tl: Qaala fa-bi-'izzatika la-ughwiyannahum ajma'een

text: Except, among them, Your chosen servants.\"
tl: Illaa 'ibaadaka minhumul mukhlaseen

text: [Allāh] said, \"The truth [is My oath], and the truth I say -
tl: Qaala falhaqq, walhaqqa aqool

text: [That] I will surely fill Hell with you and those of them that follow you all together.\"
tl: La-amla'anna Jahannama minka Wa-mimman tabi'aka minhum ajma'een

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"I do not ask you for it [i.e., the Qur’ān] any payment, and I am not of the pretentious.
tl: Qul maaa as'alukum 'alaihi min ajrinw Wa-maaa ana minal mutakallifeen

text: It is but a reminder to the worlds.
tl: In huwa illaa zikrul lil'aalameen

text: And you will surely know [the truth of] its information after a time.\"
tl: Wa-lata'lamunna naba-ahoo ba'da heen
